content.full_text:
M. Scott Hallabrin
FPPC - Legal Division
428 J Street, Rm 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

FPPC                    FEB 26, 1991
FEB 23 8 03 AM '91

Re: IDNO-901455

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

In order to clarify a doubt to better the Ridge's
Committee and myself, I am asking for your opinion
who is support signs the stated for contribution one
expenditures as on Jan 31, 1991, nearing myself as Fone
Treasurer or the v.p. Treasurer of the Committee.

Your reply will be appreciated!

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Paul T. Williams

PAUL T. WILLIAMS
3 LAGUNA WOODS DR.
LAGUNA NIGUEL, CA 92677

sections.question: In order to clarify a dispute between the Ridge Line Committee and myself, I am asking for your opinion who is supposed to sign the Statement for contributions and expenditures due on Jan. 31, 1991, namely myself as former treasurer or the new treasurer of the Committee.
sections.question_synthetic: Who is responsible for signing the Statement of contributions and expenditures for January 31, 1991 - the former treasurer or the new treasurer of the Ridge Line Committee?
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a member of the public to FPPC, not an FPPC advice letter response. No FPPC response, conclusion, or short answer section is present in this document. The letter describes a dispute regarding signatory responsibility for financial disclosure statements.

embedding.summary: Paul T. Willers, a former treasurer of the Ridge Line Committee, requests FPPC guidance on which treasurer should sign the required Statement of contributions and expenditures due January 31, 1991, to resolve a dispute with the Committee.
